subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 694302022/230101903 is not a GRB
body:
J. Wood (NASA/MSFC) and C. Fletcher (USRA) report on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 694302022/230101903 at 21:40:17 UT
on 01 January 2023, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
